name: Mistral AI
description: Bring Mistral AI into your processes: chat completions, document OCR, embeddings, content moderation, classification, agents and conversations.

properties.label: Base URL
properties.description: Change only for a dedicated / self-hosted Mistral deployment

properties.label: Mistral API key
properties.description: Use a Camunda secret: {{secrets.MISTRAL_API_KEY}}. Get a key at console.mistral.ai. Learn how to manage secrets in the Camunda documentation.

properties.label: Operation
properties.description: Pick what Mistral should do in this task

properties.label: Model
properties.description: Mistral model to use

properties.label: System prompt
properties.value: You are a helpful assistant working inside a business process. Answer concisely.
properties.description: Defines the behavior and persona of the model.

properties.label: User prompt
properties.description: The user question or instruction. Prefix with = to inject a process variable, e.g. = claimDescription

properties.label: Temperature
properties.description: 0 = deterministic, 1 = creative

properties.label: Document URL
properties.description: Public or signed URL of the document to process. Tip: combine with Files: Get download URL.

properties.value: ={"model": "mistral-ocr-latest", "document": if ocrDocType = "image_url" then {"type": "image_url", "image_url": ocrDocumentUrl} else {"type": "document_url", "document_url": ocrDocumentUrl}, "include_image_base64": false}

properties.label: Text to embed
properties.description: Text to convert into a vector embedding

properties.label: Text to moderate
properties.description: Content to check for policy violations (PII, fraud, violence, ...)

properties.label: Classifier model
properties.description: Your fine-tuned classifier model ID

properties.label: Instructions
properties.description: System instructions defining the agent's role

properties.label: Agent ID
properties.description: ID of the agent, e.g. ag_...

properties.label: Agent ID
properties.description: ID of the agent, e.g. ag_...

properties.label: Agent ID
properties.description: ID of the agent, e.g. ag_...

properties.label: Fields to update (JSON)
properties.description: Only include the fields you want to change

properties.label: Message
properties.description: First user message of the conversation

properties.label: From entry ID
properties.description: Entry to restart the conversation from

properties.label: Result variable
properties.description: Name of a single variable to store the full response in

properties.label: Result expression
properties.description: Maps the model's answer to mistralReply. Adjust as needed.

properties.label: Result expression
properties.description: Maps extracted pages and concatenated markdown text.
properties.value: ={ocrPages: response.body.pages, ocrText: string join(for p in response.body.pages return p.markdown, "\n")}

properties.label: Result expression
properties.description: Maps the embedding vector.

properties.label: Result expression
properties.description: Maps moderation categories and scores.

properties.label: Result expression
properties.description: Maps the conversation ID (reuse it to append) and agent outputs.

properties.label: Result expression
properties.description: Maps the full response body to mistralResult.

properties.label: Error expression
properties.description: Map HTTP errors to BPMN errors, e.g. if error.code = "429" then bpmnError("RATE_LIMIT", "Mistral rate limit hit") else null. Details in the documentation.

properties.label: Retries
properties.description: Number of retries

properties.label: Retry backoff
properties.description: ISO-8601 duration to wait between retries, e.g. PT5S

properties.value: =if wfExecuteInput = null or wfExecuteInput = "" then {} else {"input": wfExecuteInput}

properties.label: Workflow name or ID
properties.description: Name of the workflow as registered in Mistral Studio (e.g. hello-world)

properties.label: Input (JSON)
properties.description: Input payload matching the workflow signature, e.g. {"name": "World"}

properties.label: Signal name
properties.description: Name of the signal handler defined in the workflow (e.g. approve)
